calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Determining Trust'S Title To Real Property
Off Calendar Aug-10-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Diana Redding, via ZOOM, for Ho Kit Cho, Petitioner.

The court begins by asking counsel what will happen with the property if the court denies the petition. Counsel reports that there are four (4) deeds, all showing incorrect legal descriptions of the property. Counsel also reports that notice has been provided to beneficiaries to the third degree. The court and counsel briefly discuss notice to beneficiaries and regarding reformation of the deed. The court then advises counsel that it will consider granting the petition, but the court will not order the deed reformed which essentially, will not cure the issue with the deed. Counsel states approval of the court's tentative ruling.

The Petition for Order Determining Trust's Title to Real Property is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition For Order Determining Trust'S Title To Real Property
